title: The means specified for the purposes of section 33(5)(ab) are—
content:
(a)	
a document (in hard copy form or electronic form)—
	
(i)	
issued by a public officer or any person on behalf 
of the Government; and
	
(ii)	
that shows the prescribed information relating to 
the employee;
	
(b)	
electronic data—
	
(i)	
access 
to 
which 
can 
be 
obtained, 
by 
telecommunications, in a manner specified by a 
public officer; and
	
(ii)	
that shows the prescribed information relating to 
the employee.

metadata.source_file: Cap 57 Consolidated version for the Whole Chapter (24-08-2025) (English).pdf
